title: Static, no-PII aggregate visualization of the data cube
context: BACKLOG: A static, no-PII aggregate visualization layer on the canonical data cube would improve accessibility of findings for partner organizations and the public. The visualization must be aggregate-only (no individual data), honor suppression (suppressed cells are displayed as suppressed, not zero or interpolated), include no ranking/scorecard framing, and carry the mandatory caveats. This is lower priority than the core analysis and reports.
objective: Build a static, client-side visualization of the canonical disparities data cube for the exemplar site. The visualization must: display only aggregate, suppressed, license-cleared data; display suppressed cells as explicitly suppressed (not as zero or blank or interpolated); include no ranking or scorecard display (no 'worst states/counties' lists); carry the mandatory caveats (data vintage, suppression, CIs, ecological-fallacy, 'association is not causation', 'not medical advice'); be statically generated from the data cube so no individual-level data can be inferred from the visualization; and include provenance/source attribution.
acceptanceCriteria: Visualization is fully static (no server-side data processing, no API serving individual queries over thin cells) and generated at build time from the canonical suppressed data cube

Displays only aggregate, suppressed, license-cleared data; suppressed cells are displayed as explicitly suppressed (e.g. labeled 'data suppressed — count < 10') rather than as zero, blank, or interpolated
No ranking or scorecard display: no sorted lists of 'best/worst' geographies, no color scales that rank communities, no 'naming and shaming'
Mandatory caveats are displayed on every view: data vintage, suppression rule, CI availability, ecological-fallacy/'association is not causation' note, and 'not medical advice'
Source attribution is displayed for every data dimension shown, linking to the Source provenance record
Suppression re-identification check: the visualization does not enable reconstruction of suppressed cells by cross-filtering aggregate views
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; no secrets or PII in build artifacts
Methods reviewer and framing reviewer sign-off recorded
output: A merged PR adding a static, no-PII aggregate visualization of the disparities data cube — suppression-honored, no ranking/scorecard, mandatory caveats displayed, provenance attributed, and methods + framing reviewed.
